description: These are a collection of clips of liberalwarrior playing under the nickname ZAKUII58. They are closet cheating with an ESP. In the first clip, I was spawn peeking from strip, and was not droned out. You can see the player run over their drone just out of spawn, rappel up to the roof, then very oddly check the door I was peeking before any breaks were visible. They then droned the door, looked at me through the wall, and decided against pushing me. The second clip is from later this round, the player dropped Logi hatch, and did a very odd quickpeek check, exactly where I was on main stairs, with no info. In  the 3rd clip, the player pushes dirt, tries to check the breach but can't get an angle on Valk, then flashes and pushes, again with no information. At this point in the game, I really wasn't suspect of them. In the 4th clip, you can see the player shoot my drone on the vents in garage, with no prior information of it's location. At this point, I suspected them, but they still weren't playing very well so I didn't give it much mind. Later in the same clip, they look at Twitch through the wall, then peek and ping her exact location. While they do have the information that Twitch is shooting from spawn, there is no chance they'd know she was exactly where they looked from audio and bullet trails at that range. In the 5th clip, the player runs out and tosses a nitro onto the server main wall. Nothing crazy here, aside from the slight glance up and to the right just before they get to the door. In the 6th clip the player gets a fairly sus shot onto Zofia, with no prior information. In the 7th clip, the player challenges myself and Monty on the Con/Cash door, but they aim at Monty's knees, perfectly head level with the crouch-peek I was holding, that they had no prior information of. Final clip is scoreboard and nickname proof.
